endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.HanaOnAzure/operations
endpoints.description: Gets a list of SAP HANA management operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Gets a list of SAP HANA instances in the specified subscription.
endpoints.description: Gets a list of SAP HANA instances in the specified subscription. The operations returns various properties of each SAP HANA on Azure instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Gets a list of SAP monitors in the specified subscription.
endpoints.description: Gets a list of SAP monitors in the specified subscription. The operations returns various properties of each SAP monitor.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Gets a list of SAP HANA instances in the specified subscription and the resource group.
endpoints.description: Gets a list of SAP HANA instances in the specified subscription and the resource group. The operations returns various properties of each SAP HANA on Azure instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets properties of a SAP HANA instance.
endpoints.description: Gets properties of a SAP HANA instance for the specified subscription, resource group, and instance name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{HANAINSTANCENAME}} with a real hanainstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Creates a SAP HANA instance.
endpoints.description: Creates a SAP HANA instance for the specified subscription, resource group, and instance name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{HANAINSTANCENAME}} with a real hanainstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Deletes a SAP HANA instance.
endpoints.description: Deletes a SAP HANA instance with the specified subscription, resource group, and instance name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{HANAINSTANCENAME}} with a real hanainstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Patches the Tags field of a SAP HANA instance.
endpoints.description: Patches the Tags field of a SAP HANA instance for the specified subscription, resource group, and instance name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{HANAINSTANCENAME}} with a real hanainstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.HanaOnAzure/hanaInstances/{hanaInstanceName}/restart
endpoints.description: The operation to restart a SAP HANA instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{HANAINSTANCENAME}} with a real hanainstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.HanaOnAzure/hanaInstances/{hanaInstanceName}/shutdown
endpoints.description: The operation to shutdown a SAP HANA instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{HANAINSTANCENAME}} with a real hanainstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.HanaOnAzure/hanaInstances/{hanaInstanceName}/start

endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{HANAINSTANCENAME}} with a real hanainstancename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
